name: Advanced Multi-Channel Lead Routing & Scoring
description: Enterprise-grade Make.com scenario that watches for leads across multiple channels (Google Forms, Facebook Lead Ads). It validates phone numbers and emails, uses AI for initial sentiment analysis, and routes to NEXUS OS CRM with dead-letter queue error handling.

modules.purpose: Listens for inbound leads from various marketing channels.
Validates email format and normalizes phone numbers. Throws error if invalid.
Analyzes the lead's notes to determine sentiment, urgency, and extracts missing vehicle preferences.

routes.condition: AI Urgency is WARM or COLD

directives.description: If NEXUS OS CRM API is down, pause and retry up to 3 times over 15 minutes.
If Slack notification fails, ignore and continue processing.
If validation fails, write the raw payload to a Google Sheet 'Dead Letter Leads' for manual review.

business_impact: Ensures zero lead drop-off, validates data before CRM entry to maintain database hygiene, and instantly prioritizes high-value prospects.
